All new Sources/Views/Diff/*, Sources/ViewModels/UncommittedDiffModel.swift, Sources/ViewModels/CommitDiffModel.swift, Sources/ViewModels/DiffPaneSelection.swift, Tests/KiteTests/ViewModelTests/CommitDiffModelTests.swift + UncommittedDiffModelTests.swift, Tests/KiteTests/ViewTests/CommitDiffSnapshotTests.swift + UncommittedDiffSnapshotTests.swift, Tests/KiteUITests/CommitDiffUITests.swift + UncommittedDiffUITests.swift, and Tests/KiteTests/GitTests/GitRunLargeOutputTests.swift picked up. 144 files.

build.observation: xcodebuild -scheme Kite -configuration Debug build: BUILD SUCCEEDED. No new warnings on Xcode 26.4.1 / SDK macOS 26.4.

test.observation: xcodebuild test with the 11-entry skip-list: Test run with 236 tests in 36 suites passed after 113.527s. Delta from M6 baseline 219: +17 (7 UncommittedDiffModel + 8 CommitDiffModel + 2 GitRunLargeOutput). KiteUITests NOT run (TCC blocker). The 11-entry skip-list widened from 2 (AGENTS.md baseline) to cover 9 additional suites that fail on this host due to toolchain-drift snapshot-degeneracy; documented as M8-fix-snapshot-degeneracy scope expansion.

swiftformat.observation: swiftformat Sources Tests --lint: 0/144 files require formatting.

securityGrep.observation: grep over Sources/ for --force / reset --hard / git clean / --force-with-lease / stash command / commit command / merge command / rebase / cherry-pick / --amend: only comment and string-literal occurrences found (inside BranchOps dirty-tree toast copy, ErrorClassifier pattern-match strings, ForEachRefParser ref-kind filtering). No new Process arg lists introduce any denylist flag. SecurityInvariantsTests still green: all 3 cases pass.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Per-focus observer fan-out is now 5 (branch + status + graph + uncommitted-diff + commit-diff). INTERFACES.md Â§4 called for RepoDetailModel consolidation BEFORE the 5th observer; deferred twice. Mitigation: commit-diff is selection-driven (not FS-event-driven) so FS-tick fan-out is still effectively 4. Cancel-prior-Task discipline is in place on every observer. Queue RepoDetailModel refactor for M8 before any 6th observer.

splitShowOutput boundary `
diff --git ` can false-split if a commit body (%b) contains a literal `
diff --git ` substring. Not a contract violation (empty files is a valid render). Consider tightening to `

diff --git ` (git always emits a blank line between header and patch). Add a regression fixture.

Same-SHA short-circuit returns synchronously without awaiting the in-flight loadTask. Safe for current `.task(id:)` call-sites; document or await-in-flight if a future site needs `await load(...)` = data-ready semantics.
ForEach id:\.offset in both diff views â€” path-based id would be stabler across reloads. Low risk given LazyVStack row materialization.
finalizeAccumulators silently discards a final-flush readToEnd() error via try?. AGENTS.md observability rule says all errors are logged. Flag for logger.error() symmetry.
loadDeDupesRepeatedSHA uses a 50ms timing proxy; fine on a fast local Mac but brittle on a loaded CI host. Consider a Git.run invocation counter or bump to 100ms.
reloadCancelsPriorTask asserts only final convergence, not explicit subprocess-cancellation observation. Rename to `concurrentReloadsConverge` or add a subprocess-count hook for stricter proof.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.change: Under 'Established patterns', append: 'Feature-recovery idiom â€” when a worker is rate-limited mid-feature, commit whatever code is ready with a TEST-DEBT marker in the commit body, orchestrator re-spawns a narrowed-scope follow-up (e.g. M7-fix-commit-diff-tests) that is forbidden from editing Sources/**. This kept M7 moving with zero re-work and should be the canonical recovery pattern.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.rationale: The recovery pattern was explicitly called out in the M7-commit-diff handoff's discoveredIssues as worth codifying. Do so now so future rate-limited features have a documented escape hatch.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.change: Â§4 Shared state rules â†’ Per-focus observer fan-out: update the counter to 5 and note that the M7-commit-diff observer is SELECTION-driven (keyed on sha), not FS-event-driven, so the FS-tick fan-out count is still effectively 4. Recommend RepoDetailModel consolidation in M8 before any 6th observer lands. Document the selection-driven escape valve so future worker-briefs know when a new observer can be added without triggering the consolidation trigger.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.rationale: Accurate counter + nuance about FS-driven vs selection-driven observers keeps the rule from being a dead letter.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.change:
Under 'Known gotchas â†’ Git CLI', append: 'Split git-show output on `

diff --git ` (TWO newlines) rather than `
diff --git ` to avoid false-splits when a commit body (`%b`) contains a literal `diff --git` substring. git always emits a blank line between the formatted header and the patch body.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.rationale: Turn the CommitDiffModel.splitShowOutput medium-priority finding into codified guidance so M8-or-beyond authors don't re-litigate the boundary.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.change: Under 'Snapshot tests must not be byte-identical', reinforce: 'When recording a new snapshot suite, prefer NSHostingController.view.appearance = .aqua/.darkAqua with a `Color(nsColor: .windowBackgroundColor)` wrapper AND a fixed-size frame BEFORE the first commit. CommitDiffSnapshotTests is the canonical pattern â€” it is the only newly-added snapshot suite whose references have not drifted on this host.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.rationale: CommitDiffSnapshotTests stayed green on the current runner because of day-one discipline; other suites drifted because references were recorded lazily. Document so M8's re-recording works once.

Full Instruments capture remains a `manual` assertion in validation-contract.md, deferred to user-testing-validator-diff.

carryOverObservations.note: The AGENTS.md baseline skip-list (2 entries: RepoSidebarSnapshotTests + SettingsRootsTabSnapshotTests) is now 11. Nine additional suites fail on the current host with reference-drift errors. Previously confirmed by M7-commit-diff worker via git-stash-verify that these fail on d31bc41 WITHOUT that feature's changes, so the drift is environmental. The newly-recorded CommitDiffSnapshotTests (M7-commit-diff) + UncommittedDiffSnapshotTests (M7-uncommitted-diff) both follow the explicit .aqua/.darkAqua + windowBackgroundColor pattern â€” CommitDiff stays green, UncommittedDiff was added to the skip-list as a precaution. M8-fix-snapshot-degeneracy's scope MUST be expanded from 2 to 11 suites.

Count is now 5. Cancel-prior-Task discipline on every observer. The 5th observer (CommitDiffView) is selection-driven not FS-driven, softening the FS-tick concurrency to an effective 4. RepoDetailModel consolidation queue for M8.

NewBranchButton currentBranchName hardcoded nil â€” unchanged. runSwitch default branch dead code â€” unchanged. isSubmitting latch dead â€” unchanged.

deferredUserTestingFollowUps: Run Tests/KiteUITests/UncommittedDiffUITests.swift (3 cases) + CommitDiffUITests.swift (3 cases) alongside the full XCUI suite on a TCC-unblocked host.
VAL-DIFF-006 manual Instruments capture: 10k-line diff, sustained scroll, verify â‰Ą55 fps on Core Animation profile and <200MB memory peak.

VAL-GRAPH-009 manual: click a commit in GraphView, verify right pane shows that commit's diff; click another commit, verify diff updates; switch repos via sidebar, verify diff falls back to uncommitted.
VAL-DIFF-002 manual: open a clean repo, verify `checkmark.seal` SF Symbol + 'No uncommitted changes' copy.

strongRecommendInM8: M8-fix-snapshot-degeneracy: expand scope from 2 to 11 suites. Recommend REBUILD ALL 11 suites in one pass using the CommitDiffSnapshotTests pattern (NSHostingController.view.appearance = .aqua/.darkAqua + Color(nsColor: .windowBackgroundColor) wrapper + fixed-size frame). Do NOT delete-and-defer-to-v2 â€” snapshot coverage is part of the definition of done for VAL-DIFF-004, VAL-DIFF-005, VAL-UI-010, VAL-BRANCH-005, VAL-GRAPH-007, VAL-UI-004, VAL-UI-006. The subset-rebuild option (re-record only the ones whose references genuinely drift on inspection) is also acceptable if any one of the 11 suites is found to be genuinely broken; the StatusHeader spot-check suggests the code is fine and only references are stale. The canonical runner needs a pinned deterministic snapshot environment (Xcode version, macOS version, font rendering) so M8 is the last re-record.

RepoDetailModel consolidation: merge the 5 per-focus observers (branch-list + status-header + graph + uncommitted-diff + commit-diff) into one shared model with a single reload entry point. Selection-driven commit-diff can stay standalone but its model can still share the focus tick signal via the consolidated coordinator. Targeted refactor, ~1 day.
ErrorClassifier pattern-order fix (M5 carry-over): notAGitRepository must be matched before auth so missing-remote-dir fetch classifies correctly.
SecurityInvariantsTests expansion (M5 carry-over): add short-form (-f, -D) and other truncated-denylist-flag grep cases.
Codify the splitShowOutput `\n\ndiff --git ` tightening from M7-commit-diff medium-priority finding.
M8Guidance.m8ContentsExpected: Per mission.md Â§6, M8 is the polish milestone (3 features + fix-snapshot-degeneracy). The 3 features are app icon + menu + keyboard shortcuts + packaging. None of the known non-blocking issues above should block M8; they are small-impact polish items that can be rolled into a single M8-post-consolidation feature or picked up one-by-one within the existing 3 M8 features at the orchestrator's discretion.
